title: Eva 4
wikitext:
[]: Eva 4             Quote Post by javirod » Tue Feb 21, 2012 9:59 pm okay i was watching the series, and of course i have a billion doubts but one specifically bothers me, what the hell happened to unit 4? I mean, the other units get blown up all the time and they survive. Heck, even when the blast are bad such as with angel 9, they get destroyed but are quickly repaired. So what happened to unit 4 and the second branch? I would like to see what design the coulda come up with for unit 4 :/

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Tue Feb 21, 2012 10:30 pm Unit 04's destruction was caused by the experimental S 2 engine, and the unit along with the branch was completely vaporized. The reason for starters is that compared to any other explosion in the series this is the largest, second I believe that Ritsuko said something along the lines that a sea of Dirac was created which would have swallowed anything including the evangelion. further information can be found on the wiki And for future posts try to post in the appropriate subforum.

[]:             Quote Post by sum_exsanguis » Thu May 03, 2012 3:28 pm It didn't just blow up, didn't they say that it was as if everything dsappeared, or am I remembering wrong...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu May 03, 2012 3:39 pm Ritsuko says with some reservations that the Eva and the surrounding area were absorbed into a Dirac Sea. This seems to be the canon explanation, since Eva-04 can be retrieved -- from the Dirac Sea -- in NGE2. The Eva-04 incident also suggests that the S2 Engine works (...when it DOES work) by channeling energy from the Dirac Sea (which is supposed to house a "sea of negative energy", or, according to some, the fabled "ether").

Article: Eva 4
[]: Eva 4             Quote Post by javirod » Tue Feb 21, 2012 9:59 pm okay i was watching the series, and of course i have a billion doubts but one specifically bothers me, what the hell happened to unit 4? I mean, the other units get blown up all the time and they survive. Heck, even when the blast are bad such as with angel 9, they get destroyed but are quickly repaired. So what happened to unit 4 and the second branch? I would like to see what design the coulda come up with for unit 4 :/

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Tue Feb 21, 2012 10:30 pm Unit 04's destruction was caused by the experimental S 2 engine, and the unit along with the branch was completely vaporized. The reason for starters is that compared to any other explosion in the series this is the largest, second I believe that Ritsuko said something along the lines that a sea of Dirac was created which would have swallowed anything including the evangelion. further information can be found on the wiki And for future posts try to post in the appropriate subforum.

[]:             Quote Post by sum_exsanguis » Thu May 03, 2012 3:28 pm It didn't just blow up, didn't they say that it was as if everything dsappeared, or am I remembering wrong...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu May 03, 2012 3:39 pm Ritsuko says with some reservations that the Eva and the surrounding area were absorbed into a Dirac Sea. This seems to be the canon explanation, since Eva-04 can be retrieved -- from the Dirac Sea -- in NGE2. The Eva-04 incident also suggests that the S2 Engine works (...when it DOES work) by channeling energy from the Dirac Sea (which is supposed to house a "sea of negative energy", or, according to some, the fabled "ether").
